The '''YG-5000 light freighter''' was a design in the successful [[YG-series/Legends|YG-series]] transport line developed by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]], many centuries before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Three main [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight engines]] were mounted to the YG-5000, similar in arrangement to the engines of the [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class space cruiser]].<ref name="G2" />

Reflecting the customizable design philosophy of CEC, it was relatively simple to make extensive modifications to YG-series ships - for example, swapping the engines of a YG-5000 onto the forward hull of a [[YG-4210]]. This modularity allowed refurbished YG-series ships to serve for centuries.<ref name="G2" />
